header: Timeline that feels ready to ship
subheadline: Uses concise editorial copy, calm shadcn spacing, and a real content rhythm so the block feels publishable.

items.title: What makes this pattern production-ready?
items.content: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.

items.title: How does it stay theme-aware?
items.content: A sharp, production-minded timeline using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so content teams can publish clearer stories with reusable blocks.

items.title: What should editors check first?
items.content: Built to show the timeline with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

items.title: How does it behave on mobile?
items.content: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this timeline easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.
